We are then in much less danger of

pg88-p1:
running the show, humbly saying to ourselves many times each day "Thy will be done." We are then in much less danger of
excitement, fear, anger, worry, self-pity, or foolish decisions. We become much more efficient. We do not tire so
easily, for we are not burning up energy foolishly as we did when we were trying to arrange life to suit ourselves.
pg88-p3-s2: So we let God discipline us in the simple way we have just outlined.
pg88-p3: We alcoholics are undisciplined. So we let God discipline us in the simple way we have just outlined.
pg88-p4-s2: There is action and more action. "Faith without works is dead."
pg88-p4-s3:
The next chapter is entirely
devoted to Step Twelve.
pg88-p4:
But this is not all. There is action and more action. "Faith without works is dead." The next chapter is entirely
devoted to Step Twelve.
